name: German Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs until light and frothy.
2. Add flour, salt, sugar, and milk to the eggs. Beat for an additional 5 minutes until the mixture is smooth and creamy.
3. Grease a large skillet with butter for each pancake. Heat the pan until it is very hot, but do not allow the butter to burn.
4. Pour enough batter into the skillet to cover the bottom and slightly up the sides of the pan, but avoid excess.
5. Cook the pancake on one side until it is nicely browned.
6. Turn the pancake carefully using a spatula.
7. The second side will brown quickly.
8. Place the pancake onto a warm plate. Sprinkle with cinnamon sugar and lemon juice, then spread jam over the top.
9. Roll up the pancake like a small jelly roll, sprinkle again with cinnamon sugar, cut into two pieces, and serve.
